name: Braze SDK data endpoint (sessions / events / attributes)

metadata.notes: This is the client-side SDK endpoint (sdk.<cluster>.braze.com/api/v3/data), NOT the server REST API. The RN JS layer never calls this directly - it calls native Braze.initialize()/logCustomEvent()/changeUser() etc, which the native Android (Kotlin/Java) or iOS (Swift) SDK batches and POSTs here on a background dispatch thread/timer.
